description: Livo built-in RSS feeds — mainstream Chinese and international news media

feeds.title: 人民日报
feeds.descriptionZh: 人民日报全文 RSS，中共中央机关报，中国最具影响力的官方媒体
feeds.descriptionEn: People's Daily full-text RSS, the official newspaper of the CPC Central Committee and China's most influential state media

feeds.title: 经济日报
feeds.descriptionZh: 经济日报全文 RSS，国务院主办的经济类日报，权威财经资讯与政策解读
feeds.descriptionEn: Economic Daily full-text RSS, authoritative financial news and policy analysis sponsored by the State Council

feeds.title: 南方周末
feeds.descriptionZh: 南方周末全文 RSS，中国最具影响力的深度新闻周报，以调查报道和评论见长
feeds.descriptionEn: Southern Weekly full-text RSS, China's most influential in-depth news weekly known for investigative reporting and commentary

feeds.title: China Daily Newspaper
feeds.descriptionZh: China Daily 全文 RSS，中国国家英文日报，对外传播中国声音与视角
feeds.descriptionEn: China Daily full-text RSS, China's national English-language newspaper providing Chinese perspectives to the world

feeds.title: The New York Times
feeds.descriptionZh: 纽约时报全文 RSS，美国最具影响力的国际新闻媒体，深度报道全球时事
feeds.descriptionEn: The New York Times full-text RSS, America's most influential international news media with in-depth global coverage

feeds.title: The New Yorker
feeds.descriptionZh: 纽约客全文 RSS，美国经典周刊，以深度报道、评论、小说与幽默漫画著称
feeds.descriptionEn: The New Yorker full-text RSS, iconic American weekly featuring long-form reporting, commentary, fiction and humor
